room_fidelity.evidence: All rooms are correctly defined and connected.

window_fidelity.evidence: All windows are correctly aligned and openable.

global_visual.evidence: The model is visually consistent and free of major discrepancies.

scale_rotation.evidence: The model is correctly scaled and oriented.

door_fidelity.evidence: All doors are correctly aligned and openable.

wall_fidelity.evidence: All walls are correctly aligned and continuous.
